regex: Discarding packet received on ([a-zA-Z0-9-_]*) interface that has no IPv4 address assigned.
.*Failed to bind socket to (link local|global) ipv6 address on interface ([a-zA-Z0-9]*).*
DHCP_RELAY_SEND_FAIL protocol=(DHCPv[46]) downlink=([a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+) uplink=([a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+) dest_ip=([a-zA-Z0-9.:]+) vrf=([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+) reason="([^"]+)"
